title: CRAN-PM: Cross-Resolution Attention Network for high-resolution PM2.5 forecasting over Europe
description: CRAN-PM is a multi-scale deep-learning model for short-range high-resolution surface PM2.5 forecasting over Europe. It fuses 25 km ERA5 meteorology and CAMS chemistry with 1 km satellite-derived PM2.5 analyses through a cross-resolution attention bridge with an elevation-aware attention bias. This archive corresponds to release v1.0.0.
